title: Implement admin endpoint for comprehensive user details
description: 1. Update User model to track `last_login_at`, `last_login_ip`, and `last_login_device` (could be parsed User-Agent). 2. Update login endpoint to record these values. 3. Create an admin-only endpoint `GET /api/v1/users/{user_id}/admin-profile` that returns all user data, including their addresses, phone, order history, linked IoT devices, and the new login diagnostic fields. Make sure to use appropriate response schemas.
acceptance_criteria: `GET /api/v1/users/{user_id}/admin-profile` returns 200 with full user data including addresses, orders, and devices for admins only
Non-admins receive 403 Forbidden on the new endpoint
Proper Alembic migration is created for the new fields
